title: Marketing Agency Saves 40+ Hours Per Week
challenge: A 12-person agency was drowning in client reporting, social media management, and campaign optimisation — limiting their ability to take on new clients.
solution: Deployed Clara (Communications) and Marcus (Marketing) as digital employees, automating campaign reporting, social scheduling, and performance analysis.
results:
- 40+ hours saved per week across the team
- 3 new clients onboarded without hiring
- 23% improvement in campaign ROI
- Client satisfaction score increased from 7.2 to 9.1
testimonial: Numu didn't just give us tools — they gave us team members. Clara and Marcus handle the work that was burning out our staff.
